species: Taking advantage of the cerebral organoids as a model for studying neurological diseases in humans
tissue: human cerebral organoids (hCOs) as well as from rodents’ brain
cell_type: CSTB presence in the synaptic territories was also confirmed by immunostaining on human neurons in vitro
disease_state: Loss-of-function mutations in CSTB gene cause progressive myoclonic epilepsy 1 (EPM1)
sample_source: isolated synaptosomes from hCOs samples obtained from EPM1 patients and control
age: Wistar male rats (Charles River Laboratories, Calco, Lecco, Italy) of about 3 months of age were kept in the animal house
cell_line: Taking advantage of the cerebral organoids as a model for studying neurological diseases in humans
strain: C57BL/6 J mice were kept in the animal facility of the Max Planck Institute of Psychiatry
